Main - Cases - Sanitation of sewer connections in the historic center of Hamburg

[ 2025 ]

Sanitation of sewer connections in the historic center of Hamburg

Repair of 12 DN150 diameter house connections in a densely built-up area of the 19th century. The work was carried out without access to the basements of residential buildings, without excavation in the surrounding areas and without coordination with residents. SP!RES technology/RES allowed to restore the tightness of the pipelines, preserving the historical infrastructure of the city.

Key parameters:
Diameter (nominal)DN100
Wall thickness after polymerization4 mm
Length (available options)3 m, 6 m, 9 m, 12 m
Base materialPolyester (PES)
Resin TypeHeat-cured (unsaturated polyester)
Polymerization time at 80°C60 minutes
Max. operating temperature+50°C (short-term up to +80°C)
Stiffness classSN4 (on request SN8)
Display colorWhite (outer layer), blue (marker)
PackagingVacuum packaging + thermal container

[ Objectives and goals ]

What did the customer encounter?

Hamburg's historic center is a densely built-up area with limited access to utilities. Cast-iron sewer outlets, laid more than 70 years ago, have fallen into disrepair: multiple fistulas, cracks and leak-proof joints.

The main problems:

  • Access to the pipes is possible only through the basements of residential buildings (private property)
  • Excavations in the surrounding areas required coordination with the Department of Architecture (Monuments)
  • Residents opposed noisy work and the dismantling of coverings
  • The traditional repair method required the relocation of residents for the duration of the work.
  • The city's budget was limited

Project objectives:

  • To restore the tightness of 12 outlets without access to basements
  • Exclude excavation and damage to historical paving stones
  • To carry out the work as inconspicuously as possible for residents
  • Meet a tight deadline
  • Get a documentary confirmation of the repair quality
SP!RES pipe relining systems
SP!RES sewer pipe relining systems

[ Description ]

How did the work go?

Lorem Is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry

Preparatory stage

The first stage was a TV inspection of all 12 issues. This made it possible to accurately determine the damage sites, pipe diameters and the length of the areas requiring rehabilitation. At the same time, the pipes were hydrodynamically cleaned of deposits.

The first stage was a TV inspection of all 12 issues. This made it possible to accurately determine the damage sites, pipe diameters and the length of the areas requiring rehabilitation. At the same time, the pipes were hydrodynamically cleaned of deposits.

[ Results ]

What has been achieved

Criteria Traditional method (excavation) The SP!RES method
Deadlines3-4 weeks3 days
The need for excavationДа (бурстката, газоны)Нет
Access to the basementsДа (12 согласований)Нет
Complaints from residentsВысокий риск0 жалоб
Budget100%Экономия 65%
ReportingФото, актыЮридически значимый PDF
